name: code-review
description: Structured Copilot-powered code review in a table view.

commands.title: Code Review: Apply fixes from last review
Code Review: Fix preview — Accept block
Code Review: Fix preview — Reject block
Code Review: Fix preview — Accept all
Code Review: Fix preview — Reject all
Code Review: Assistant - File-wise Unit Test
Code Review: Assistant - Testscript Self Healing
Code Review: Show saved GitHub user (Copilot sign-in)
Code Review: Export review report (PDF or Excel from palette)

viewsWelcome.contents: Select an action to get started.

codeReview.useMockCopilot.markdownDescription: When **enabled**, the extension uses built-in mock responses (no Python proxy, no Copilot API). When **disabled** or removed, requests go to the real Copilot client. For HSBC/production, leave this **off**.

codeReview.envFile.markdownDescription: Absolute path to a `.env` file **outside** the extension (VSIX packages cannot ship secrets). Example: `C:\\Users\\me\\.code-review.env` or `~/.code-review.env`. If set and the file exists, Copilot Python loads it. Leave empty to use only `python/.env` next to the bundled script (dev) or your OS environment variables.

codeReview.httpProxy.markdownDescription: Optional HTTP proxy URL for Copilot Python calls. Leave empty to use environment defaults.

codeReview.httpsProxy.markdownDescription: Optional HTTPS proxy URL for Copilot Python calls. Leave empty to use environment defaults.

codeReview.noProxy.markdownDescription: Optional comma-separated hosts that should bypass proxy (NO_PROXY).

codeReview.sslCertFile.markdownDescription: Optional absolute path to corporate CA certificate bundle (PEM). Applied to Python (`SSL_CERT_FILE`) and Node (`NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS`).

codeReview.agentMode.markdownDescription: When **enabled**, each of the 8 review types runs through a LangGraph agent that can call local tools (codebase grep, file read, git blame, semgrep, AST pattern matching, etc.) before producing findings. Turn off to fall back to a single non-agent LLM call per review type.

codeReview.agentModel.markdownDescription: Model used for agent-mode reviews. Passed to the GitHub Copilot proxy as the `model` field. Does not affect the non-agent path (which uses `GITHUB_COPILOT_MODEL`).

codeReview.agentMaxIterations.markdownDescription: Maximum plan→tool loop iterations per review type. Higher = more thorough but slower and more expensive.

codeReview.fixApplyImmediately.markdownDescription: When **enabled** (default), clicking **Accept** or **Fix All One by One** in the review panel writes the fix to the file in one step — no separate in-editor diff confirmation. Disable to keep the CodeLens-based two-step preview where you accept/reject each diff block in the editor.

codeReview.agentTools.semgrep.markdownDescription: Allow the agent to invoke `semgrep` (local static analysis). Turn off if semgrep is not installed or not desired on this machine.
